channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Lok Sabha rejects Opposition's no-confidence motion against Speaker Om Birla
item.description: In a significant development in Parliament, the Lok Sabha on Wednesday rejected the Opposition's motion to remove Speaker Om Birla through a voice vote. The motion, brought by the Congress party, accu...

item.title: Panchayati Raj Ministry Introduces 'Nirbhay Raho' to Strengthen Safety and Leadership of Women in Rural Areas
item.description: The Ministry of Panchayati Raj convened a national conference on Wednesday with over 700 participants, mostly women, to mark one year of the 'Sashakt Panchayat - Netri Abhiyan' programme. During the e...

item.title: Documents reveal Starmer overlooked concerns over Mandelson’s Epstein connections
item.description: Newly released government documents show that Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer was warned about the risks of appointing Lord Peter Mandelson as UK ambassador to the United States, due to his ongoing co...

item.title: Implications of a Potential Liberal Majority on Quebec Influence and Minority Rights
item.description: The article by John Ivison discusses the potential effects of Prime Minister Mark Carney securing a Liberal majority in Canada. The immediate trigger is NDP MP Lori Idlout crossing the floor to join t...

item.title: South Africa to establish National Property Company to manage and revitalise underperforming state assets worth around R150bn
item.description: The South African Department of Public Works is set to launch the South African National Property Company (SANPC), a new state-owned entity aimed at unlocking value from the government's extensive but...

item.title: NBI finds no flight records of Zaldy Co traveling with former Marine
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) clarified that there is no record of former lawmaker Zaldy Co flying with a former Marine to deliver cash to President Ferdinand Marcos Jr.'s residence in Il...

item.title: Matt Canavan takes leadership of Nationals and criticises One Nation amid global oil crisis
item.description: Matt Canavan has officially taken the reins as the leader of the Nationals following David Littleproud’s sudden resignation. Stepping into the role with Darren Chester as his deputy, Canavan immediate...

item.title: Benefits of Using Plant-Based Soaps for Daily Skincare
item.description: Plant-based soaps have become increasingly popular among consumers seeking gentle, natural alternatives to conventional personal care products. Many traditional soaps contain synthetic additives and h...

item.title: KMTC Admission Letters for 2026 Released Amid High Portal Traffic
item.description: Nairobi — The Kenya Medical Training College (KMTC) has released admission letters for the 2026 intake, covering both pre-service and in-service applicants. The release happened on 9th March 2026, but...

item.title: Unrest in Meghalaya's Garo Hills Leads to Curfew, Army Deployment, and Postponement of Elections and Exams
item.description: Recent violence in Meghalaya's Garo Hills has caused widespread unrest in the northeastern state. Following clashes between tribal and non-tribal communities over the Garo Hills Autonomous District Co...

item.title: Preparations Underway for Special Election in Antipolo's Second District
item.description: Preparations for the special election in the second legislative district of Antipolo City are going smoothly, according to the Commission on Elections (Comelec). The poll body has coordinated with sec...

item.title: Trump Administration Initiates Trade Investigation Including India Over Manufacturing Practices
item.description: The Trump administration has launched a new investigation into manufacturing practices in 16 foreign economies, including India. This comes after the US Supreme Court struck down previous tariffs impo...

item.title: Mazda CX-3 Carbon Edition: Compact styling with limited space at a premium price
item.description: The Mazda CX-3 Carbon Edition is essentially a smaller sibling to the Mazda CX-30, but it struggles to justify its place in the lineup. While it carries Mazda’s signature sporty design cues, including...

item.title: Man allegedly held hostage for 48 hours in Dural; three suspects charged
item.description: Police have charged multiple individuals over the alleged abduction of a 53-year-old man in northern Sydney. The incident occurred outside a city tobacconist at sunrise on February 24, when the victim...

item.title: Tanzania Ports Authority Delays Implementation of New Port Fees to Allow Stakeholder Preparation
item.description: The Tanzania Ports Authority (TPA) has decided to postpone the introduction of a new Port Infrastructure Development (PID) fee from March 8 to July 1, 2026. The fee was meant to fund infrastructure up...

item.title: Nigeria and AFC Partner on $1.3 Billion Alumina Refinery Project
item.description: Naija don make one big move for the mining sector as government join hand with Africa Finance Corporation (AFC) to invest $1.3 billion. The agreement dey cover construction of one alumina refinery wey...

item.title: University of Canberra launches checklist to help carers identify delirium
item.description: Alex, a 39-year-old man with no prior history of mental illness or drug use, was admitted to a Canberra hospital after experiencing extreme delusions and agitation following a snowboarding trip overse...

item.title: Clarifying the Terms Somalia, Somali, and Somaliland
item.description: This article explains the correct usage of terms related to the Horn of Africa region. Somalia refers to the Federal Republic of Somalia, a country in East Africa recognised internationally, which has...

item.title: 15-year-old arrested after teenage girl stabbed at Thorpe St Andrew School
item.description: A 15-year-old boy has been arrested following the stabbing of a teenage girl at Thorpe St Andrew School near Norwich. The victim sustained minor injuries and was taken to hospital. The incident occurr...

item.title: Government Relocation Plan Aims to Restore Ruaha River and Protect National Park
item.description: Ruaha National Park in Tanzania is one of Africa's most precious wildlife areas, with vast miombo woodlands, diverse wildlife, and over 570 bird species. However, the Ruaha Mkuu River, which sustains ...
